redaction_note: Synthetic compact fixture for near-threshold judge calibration.
summary: Near-threshold fixture with policy, skill, case, and memory pressure.
setpoint: surface optional critique value without spending an automatic LLM call

turns.speaker: fixture-policy
turns.text: Do not publish a public Farcaster reply without approval.

turns.speaker: fixture-skill
turns.text: A reusable workflow should run validate and preflight before reuse.

turns.speaker: fixture-case
turns.text: Repeated timeout failure error retry should stay as local case evidence.

turns.speaker: fixture-memory
turns.text: User prefers short evidence-first summaries for the local repo and VPS context.
